problem_diagnosis.name: Recommendation
problem_diagnosis.description:
You are an expert ML engineer tasked with designing and improving *diagnosis tools* for a sequential recommendation model.

Goal: Build probes and metrics that analyze how the recommender behaves (embedding health, sequence sensitivity, popularity biases, etc.).

Hardware / Runtime Requirements: Lightweight probes that run on the same device as the model.

Available Objects: Trained model embeddings, meta_data, review_data, user_train.

Acceptance Checklist: MODEL_DIAGNOSIS is a single, well-defined JSON-like dict with metric values and definitions.

重要约束：纯序列化建模，仅使用用户交互序列（item IDs），不可以加入文本嵌入（text embedding）、图像特征、评论内容等任何外部模态信息。只允许使用序列中的 item ID 进行建模。

initial_idea_diagnosis.title: Model Diagnosis Tools
initial_idea_diagnosis.content: Improve the model diagnosis tool through mathematical analysis, code analysis, and research paper analysis
